## Description / Excerpt

Canonical terminology for the Shimmer family of concepts: ShimmeryMemory, Shimmer, Shimmer Lab, Shimmer Interface, anchors, field seeds, shimmerprints, manifests, and projection surfaces.

Excerpt:

## Core Vocabulary ### ShimmeryMemory The public memory substrate. It stores canonical artifacts and exposes them as navigable, shimmer-capable objects. ### Shimmer The general tuning principle. Shimmer is not a color palette, document mode, or single app. ```text Shimmer is port
